reason: The crypto market is exhibiting strong independent bullish momentum, shrugging off traditional stock market weakness. Bitcoin has recovered significantly above $71,000 after a previous dip, while major altcoins (ETH, SOL, ADA, XRP) are also seeing substantial gains and institutional interest (BlackRock's Ether ETF). This indicates robust demand and a positive sentiment, suggesting further upward potential.
headlines: Bitcoin's crash to $60,000 warned stocks first – now they're following
BlackRock’s new ether ETF for yield hungry investors debuts with $15 million in trading volume
Pi rallies more than 30% after Kraken announces listing
XRP jumps 3% as breakout above $1.39 ends early-2026 downtrend
Bitcoin above $71,000, ETH, SOL, ADA zoom higher as cryptos shrugs off stock weakness
